question: Broad knowledge of human genetics & molecular biology
Broad knowledge of genetic and genomic analytical and testing methodologies

Deep knowledge of the applications, strengths, validation methods, and limitations of important genetic and genomic testing methodologies in research and/or clinical diagnostic settings (e.g. NGS testing)
Deep knowledge of statistical tests used to analyze genomic data (e.g. NGS, GWAS, single-cell sequencing)
Broad knowledge of one or more programming languages, including literacy in interpreting code written by others
Deep knowledge of one or more programming languages to process and analyze ‘omics-level data
Deep knowledge of genomic data file types and formats
Interpretation and use of major genetic and genomic databases (e.g., OMIM, gnomAD, ClinVar, COSMIC)
Reading, writing, and manipulating code in one or more programming languages (e.g., R, Python)
‘Omics-relevant statistical analysis
Distributed cluster / cloud computing, & working with big data (i.e., running pipelines using UNIX / command line)
Validating informatics software
Bioinformatics pipeline creation / implementation for ‘omics analysis (e.g., WES, WGS, RNASeq, Bisulfite-Seq)
Interpreting results / data from different types of genetics tests (e.g., panels, whole genome sequencing, RNA sequencing)
Interpreting results / data in either a germline or somatic context
Data visualization for assessment of mapping and variant call quality (e.g., using a genome browser)
Application of ACMG and other professional guidelines in germline variant analysis (e.g., VCEP guidelines)
Application of AMP / ASCO and other professional guidelines in somatic / cancer variant analysis (e.g., CAP guidelines)
Application of ClinGen and other professional guidelines for gene curation
Assessment of case and functional studies for variant analysis
Assessment of in silico prediction for variant analysis
Technical laboratory skills in genetics / genomics methodologies
Laboratory safety
Keeping a lab book & documenting lab work
Writing genetic test reports
Writing clear, tactful, and professional emails
Generating and using slides effectively (e.g., PowerPoint, Keynote)
Speaking clearly, effectively, and persuasively
Effectively and succinctly synthesizing / summarizing complex information to generate insights
Creating visual communications (e.g., posters, infographics, figures)
Leveraging social media platforms to communicate science
Training and mentoring individuals
Demonstrating workplace etiquette (e.g., punctuality, consideration, flexibility, gratitude)
Complying with rules, guidelines, policies, laws, and regulations
Upholding commitments and meeting deadlines
Working independently, with initiative, and in a self-motivated fashion
Working effectively in a hierarchical team (e.g., collaboration, sharing timely updates, willingness to take on tasks for the good of the project / team, reporting to a team lead / supervisor)
Managing / leading a team, and / or working with direct reports
Planning, organizing, establishing priorities, and time management
Adapting to changing goals, projects, and circumstances at work
Creativity / innovative and strategic thinking
Problem solving and critical thinking
Working under pressure / managing tight deadlines
Resilience, self-awareness, and mindfulness of personal wellness and well-being
Listening / being attentive
Providing constructive feedback
Creating and maintaining a professional network (e.g., meeting people, maintaining connections)

Marketing oneself effectively when seeking and applying for job opportunities (e.g., building a strong professional reputation, pitching oneself to potential employers, standing out from other applicants)
Understanding informed consent in the context of genetic testing
Designing and / or querying ‘omics-level databases
Designing analysis pipelines for ‘omics data
Using code / pipelines written by others, with no (or with minor) modification, general maintenance of existing pipelines
Writing new code, or optimizing / heavily modifying existing code
Installing, testing, and debugging bioinformatics software for ‘omics data analysis
Performing statistical analysis on ‘omics data
Performing wet lab experiments / following protocols
Learning how to perform new techniques / protocols / use new equipment
Optimizing / modifying existing techniques / protocols / equipment
Designing new wet or dry lab experiments, techniques, protocols, and / or experimental tools
Creating new standard operating procedures (SOPs) / laboratory guidelines / manuals
Performing research with pre-clinical samples (e.g., rodents, cell lines)
Performing research with human samples (e.g., tissue, blood, swabs)
Performing clinical research / trials involving patients
Variant filtering, prioritization, and triaging from ‘omics data
Using in silico tools for variant assessment
Using & interpreting databases of genetic and genomic information
Working with genome browsers
Interpreting information on existing published variants
Interpreting information on novel variants
Implementing the ACMG and other important professional guidelines for germline variant analysis
Implementing AMP / ASCO and other professional guidelines for somatic / cancer variant analysis
Implementing ClinGen and other professional guidelines for gene curation
Providing actionable results that can impact patient care
Writing / editing grant proposals
Writing / editing research ethics proposals
Writing position papers or policy papers
Writing variant analysis reports based on professional guidelines and lab / clinic-specific requirements
Creating digital content (e.g., newsletters, social media posts, podcasts, webinars, websites)
Giving presentations
Speaking about science to scientists
Working directly with patients
Advocacy, both personal and on behalf of others, particularly marginalized groups, for acute issues and system-wide change
Providing technical guidance on the application of products and policies related to genetic services
Recruiting and tracking patients in clinical trials, including patient consenting and data collection
Communicating with / working with the media
Community service / social responsibility
Working in a team
Participating on workplace / organizational committees
Assessing business trends, strategies, and competitive activity; entrepreneurial ideas
Building and managing relationships with stakeholders
